info.title: ClickUp API
info.description: ClickUp API v2 for managing workspaces, spaces, folders, lists, tasks, comments, time tracking, and more.

post.summary: Create a list in a folder
Create a comment on a task
Create a checklist in a task
Add a tag to a task

delete.summary: Remove a tag from a task

post.summary: Set a custom field value on a task

get.description: Get tasks across all lists and spaces in a workspace with optional filters.

post.summary: Add a dependency to a task

depends_on.description: Task ID this task depends on

dependency_of.description: Task ID that depends on this task

delete.summary: Remove a dependency from a task

post.summary: Add a link between two tasks

delete.summary: Remove a link between two tasks

get.summary: Get custom fields available on a list
Get tracked time for a task

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key
